properties.displayName: User Sign-In from Different Countries Within 1 Hour
properties.description: Detects if a use have performed an impossible sign in by traveling to a different country with in less than 1 hour. This is typically a indication of a possible compromise of a breached user or a user actively using VPN.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where ResultSignature == "SUCCESS" //Only shows successful sign-ins.
| sort by UserPrincipalName asc, TimeGenerated asc //Organises logs to group by user and time generated in order.
| serialize //locks rows in order
| extend PreviousUser = prev(UserPrincipalName)//Defines PreviousUser to have the ability to look at the previous value of UserPrincipalName in the previous sign in log.
| extend PreviousLocation = prev(Location) //Defines PreviousLocation to have the ability look at the value of Location in previous sign in log.
| extend PreviousTime = prev(TimeGenerated) //Defines PreviousTime to have the ability to look at the value of TimeGenerated in the previous sign in log.
| where isnotempty(PreviousLocation) //Ensures that the previous location has a value and is not empty.
| where UserPrincipalName == PreviousUser //Ensures that the user matches the previous user value.
| where Location != PreviousLocation //Ensures that only sign in logs the don't match previous sign in locations.
| extend TimeDifference = (TimeGenerated - PreviousTime) //Defines TimeDifference to have the ability to look at the most recent sign in time and subtract the previous recent sign in time.
| where TimeDifference < 1h //Filters logs to only show sign in with less than a 1hr time span
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, PreviousLocation, Location, PreviousTime, TimeDifference
